---
title: "Session 22"
author: "Dhruvi Sheth 22294"
date: "11 March 2026"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default
---


```{r}
# initialize random number genrator

set.seed(42)

n_tests <- 1000

pvals <- runif(n_tests)

false_positives <- sum(pvals < 0.05)

cat("Number of false positives:", false_positives )

```

```{r}
# Visualize p value dist

hist(pvals,
     breaks = 20,
     main = "p-value dist",
     xlab = "",
     col = "lightblue")
```

```{r}
# How false positives scale

test_sizes <- c(100,1000,10000, 1000000)

for(n in test_sizes){
  pvals <- runif(n)
  fp <- sum(pvals < 0.05)
  
  cat("Tests:", n,
      "False positives:", fp,
      "Expected:", n*0.05, "\n")
}
```

```{r}
## Family-wise error rate (FWER)

# Probability of at least one false positive

alpha <- 0.05
n <- 100

fwer <- 1 - (1- alpha)^n

cat("\n Probability of  >=1 false positive with", n, 
    "tests:", fwer, "\n")
```

```{r}
## Family-wise error rate (FWER)

# Probability of at least one false positive

alpha <- 0.05
n <- 1000

fwer <- 1 - (1- alpha)^n

cat("Probability of  >=1 false positive with", n, 
    "tests:", fwer)
```


```{r}
## Bonferroni Correction

n_tests <- 1000
pvals <- runif(n_tests)

pvals <- c(0.0000000000000000001)


# Bonferroni adjusted p-values

p_bonf <- p.adjust(pvals, method = "bonferroni")

significant_bonf <- sum(p_bonf < 0.05)

cat("Significant after bonferroni", significant_bonf)

```


```{r}
# Visualize p value dist

hist(p_bonf,
     breaks = 200,
     main = "p-value dist",
     xlab = " p- value",
     col = "lightblue")
```
```{r}
c(p_bonf[p_bonf < 1], 0.0000000000000000001)
```


```{r}
## HOLM Correction

p_holm <- p.adjust(pvals, method = "holm")

significant_holm <- sum(p_holm < 0.05)

cat("SIgnificant after holm:", significant_holm)

c(p_holm[p_holm<1], p_bonf[p_bonf<1], 0.0000000000000000001)
```

```{r}
n <- 1000
p_null <- runif(n)

hist(p_null,
     breaks = 30,
     main = "P-value distribution (All null)",
     xlab = "p-value",
     col = "skyblue")
```

```{r}
n <- 1000
prop_tp <- 0.1   # 10% true positives

n_tp <- n * prop_tp
n_null <- n - n_tp

p_null <- runif(n_null)
p_tp <- rbeta(n_tp, 0.3, 1)

pvals <- c(p_null, p_tp)

hist(pvals, breaks=30, main="P-value distribution (with True Positives)",
     xlab="p-value", col="orange")
```

```{r}
p_bonf <- p.adjust(pvals, method="bonferroni")

hist(p_bonf, breaks=30, main="Bonferroni Adjusted P-values",
     xlab="adjusted p-value", col="red")
```

```{r}
n <- 1000
true_prop <- 0.1

n_true <- n * true_prop
n_null <- n - n_true

p_null <- runif(n_null)
p_true <- rbeta(n_true, 0.3, 1)

pvals <- c(p_null, p_true)
```


```{r}
p_bonf <- p.adjust(pvals, method = "bonferroni")
p_holm <- p.adjust(pvals, method = "holm")
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
par(mfrow = c(1,3))

hist(pvals,
     breaks = 30,
     main = "Original p-values",
     xlab = "p-value",
     col = "lightblue")

hist(p_bonf,
     breaks = 30,
     main = "Bonferroni corrected",
     xlab = "adjusted p-value",
     col = "red")

hist(p_holm,
     breaks = 30,
     main = "Holm corrected",
     xlab = "adjusted p-value",
     col = "green")
```
```{r}
sum(pvals < 0.05)
sum(p_bonf < 0.05)
sum(p_holm < 0.05)
```
